economic_notes: First Nation receives gaming revenue distributions from Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (1.77% interest, 1.7% of aggregate provincial gross gaming revenue). Has interests in 2472881 Ontario Inc., Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP, OFN Asset Management GP Corp, Thawikayhigan Limited Partnership, and 2665686 Ontario Inc. Sheila Childforever Memorial Economic Development Corporation is a consolidated subsidiary. Water treatment plant under construction ($3,146,013). COVID-19 noted as significant event.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to observe opening inventory counts for fuel and gas. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. No long-term debt outstanding; line of credit of $100,000 available but unused. Segment 'Other' includes $782,820 expenses but a negative vehicle purchase line of ($399,379) reducing total. Revenue includes deferred revenue movements netting to significant amounts. CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative of $1,501,760 recognized in year. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $5,625,959 + CMHC $1,501,760 + MIRR $205,600 + MNDM $195,534 = $7,528,853; however OFNLP gaming revenue ($538,733) treated as transfer-adjacent but classified separately; OSR taken as 'Other revenue' line of $547,333. Province is Ontario (ON). Fiscal year end is 2022 not 2024.
